item.title: Virginia GOP: Donors Didn’t Think We Could Stop Gerrymandering Until It Was Too Late
item.description: 'Until our side invests the same amount of money and enthusiasm in [get-out-the-vote], in canvassing ...as it does with consultants and media buyers, ...

item.title: How Liberal Justices Used A Footnote To Drag Out Dobbs Release Amid Assassination Threats
item.description: After the Dobbs decision overturning Roe v. Wade was leaked in May of 2022, Justice Samuel Alito warned his colleagues that delaying its official rele...

item.title: National Republicans Dodge Questions About VA Ground Game As Locals Allege ‘None Of Them Spent Any Money’
item.description: In short, Virginia’s statewide election was a national election. The only problem, frustrated Republicans say, the GOP didn’t get that.

item.title: The SPLC Is A Hedge Fund With A Dumb Anti-Racism Newsletter
item.description: At the SPLC, Moser wrote, staff joked that they would keep at their work 'Until justice rolls down like dollars.'

item.title: The Media Weren’t ‘Truth-Seeking’ Under Biden, So Why Should We Take Them Seriously Now?
item.description: When the Atlantic magazine trots out one of its mostly anonymous defamation pieces against President Trump or one of his allies, it should be conventi...
